node.excerpt: Odoo is one of those systems people either run their entire company on or have never heard of. This is the overview I give clients and new…

frontmatter.title: Odoo, explained: a field guide to the ERP that runs the whole company
frontmatter.description: What Odoo actually is, how Community and Enterprise differ, how the architecture fits together (ORM, XML views, OWL), what a custom module looks like, and how to decide if it's the right call for a business.
